text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm worn out! I ran bunches and bunches.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I really tried my best!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, do you think I've gotten better at this?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I think I have. I've been trying so hard, after all.
choice_data_list: We'll know for sure after your next race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's true! Okay, I'm gonna run hard in the
next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara has a very fulfilling summer camp.
